'''vachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xenobiotically|xenobiotically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xenobiotically|xenobiotically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:vachate|vachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vachatesher|vachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachatesherĂ«m|vachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vachatero|vachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vachateshĂ«|vachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachateshĂ«m|vachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivachatero|gokivachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivachateshĂ«|gokivachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachateshĂ«m|gokivachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govachankerom|govachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govachankeshĂ«|govachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachankeshĂ«m|govachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govachankeya|govachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vachaterom|vachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachatemu|vachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vachateya|vachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivachaterom|gokivachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachatemu|gokivachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivachateya|gokivachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:vachachate|vachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vachachatesher|vachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachachatesherĂ«m|vachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vachachatero|vachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vachachateshĂ«|vachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachachateshĂ«m|vachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivachachatero|gokivachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivachachateshĂ«|gokivachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachachateshĂ«m|gokivachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govachachankerom|govachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govachachankeshĂ«|govachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govachachankeshĂ«m|govachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govachachankeya|govachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vachachaterom|vachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vachachatemu|vachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vachachateya|vachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivachachaterom|gokivachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivachachatemu|gokivachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivachachateya|gokivachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠte|vĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠtesher|vĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|vĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠtero|vĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|vĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|vĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠchĂŠtero|gokivĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokivĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokivĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govĂŠchĂŠnkerom|govĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|govĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|govĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govĂŠchĂŠnkeya|govĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠterom|vĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠtemu|vĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vĂŠchĂŠteya|vĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivĂŠchĂŠterom|gokivĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokivĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivĂŠchĂŠteya|gokivĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:vafchafte|vafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:vafchaftesher|vafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafchaftesherĂ«m|vafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafchaftero|vafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vafchafteshĂ«|vafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafchafteshĂ«m|vafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafchaftero|gokivafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivafchafteshĂ«|gokivafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafchafteshĂ«m|gokivafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:govafchafnkerom|govafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govafchafnkeshĂ«|govafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govafchafnkeshĂ«m|govafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:govafchafnkeya|govafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:vafchafterom|vafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vafchaftemu|vafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:vafchafteya|vafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokivafchafterom|gokivafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivafchaftemu|gokivafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokivafchafteya|gokivafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
